77.reason: [Error: The loop condition `a[i]!='\0'` is incorrect because `a` is an array of `long long int`, not a string. It will not terminate properly and may access out-of-bounds memory. Should use a counter like `p` to iterate up to the number of elements stored.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition `a[i]!='\0'` is incorrect because `a` is an array of `long long int`, not a string. It will not terminate properly and may access out-of-bounds memory. Should use a counter like `p` to iterate up to the number of elements stored.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The loop condition `a[i]!='\0'` is incorrect because `a` is an array of `long long int`, not a string. This will not terminate properly and may access out-of-bounds indices. Should use a counter like `p` to iterate up to the number of stored elements.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: condition `a[i] != '\0'` treats integer array as string; 0 is a valid integer value, so loop may terminate early or miss zeros. Should loop up to `p` instead.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: comparing a[i] to '\0' (0) will stop early if a term is zero, causing incorrect sum. Should use a counter (e.g., i <= p).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: a[i]!='\0' checks if a[i] is non-zero. If any intermediate term evaluates to 0, the loop terminates prematurely. It should iterate up to p (i<=p).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  a is an integer array, not a null-terminated string; comparing with '\0' (which is 0) is logically incorrect and may cause premature loop termination or out-of-bounds access; should iterate up to index p.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect loop condition: `a[i]!='\0'` assumes `a` is a null-terminated string, but `a` is an array of `long long int`; this leads to undefined behavior and incorrect summation]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect loop termination: `a[i]` is a `long long int`, not a char; comparing against `'\0'` is invalid and leads to undefined behavior. Should iterate up to `p+1` instead.]

23.reason: Error: nub is not null-terminated; strlen will read beyond array bounds, causing undefined behavior.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: nub is not null-terminated; strlen will read beyond array bounds, causing undefined behavior.

50.reason: [Error: This causes the last digit of the operand to be processed again in the next iteration of the for loop, leading to incorrect number parsing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: This causes the last digit of the operand to be processed again in the next iteration of the for loop, leading to incorrect number parsing.]

64.reason: [Error: Same as above, causes re-processing of the last digit of the divisor, corrupting the calculation.]

11.reason: gets() is removed in the C11 standard and causes a compilation error on modern compilers; use fgets(s, sizeof(s), stdin) instead.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  gets() is removed in the C11 standard and causes a compilation error on modern compilers; use fgets(s, sizeof(s), stdin) instead.
